steps.title: Introduce the alliance's name
steps.content: The first part describes a powerful mercantile alliance that dominated northern European trade. The phrase after the blank names that alliance and adds an appositive description of it.

steps.title: Use a colon for identification
steps.content: A separates the identifying name into a new sentence, B uses a semicolon before a noun phrase rather than an independent clause, and C runs the description into the name without punctuation. The answer is D.
